subcodes.title: Words to Latimer, Remey et al, spoken on 1914-10-18
subcodes.first_line: These people who called on us today were in a state of fright. They are expecting daily
subcodes.first_line_orig: چقدر اینها مضطربند ابدا سکون ندارند این علامات عدم ایمان است در قران میفرماید
subcodes.subjects: @composure; tranquillity; serenity, @Qur'an and Hadith quotation and interpretation, @degrees of faith; certitude, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
